system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: aaron.brewer@bluehawkdefense.com
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold
DETECTED INTENT: hold_release
ACTION: release_hold
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_hitl', 'action': 'release_hold', 'preview': {'action': 'release_hold', 'customer_id': 2, 'extracted': {'order_number': 'SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002', 'quote_number': None, 'work_order_number': None, 'asset_serial': None, 'requested_action': 'Provide tracking information', 'new_ship_date': None, 'service_type': None, '_intent': 'hold_release'}}, 'applied': {'applied': False, 'reason': 'order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 not found in Salesforce'}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'order_number': 'SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002', 'quote_number': None, 'work_order_number': None, 'asset_serial': None, 'requested_action': 'Provide tracking information', 'new_ship_date': None, 'service_type': None, '_intent': 'hold_release'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold", "body": "Dear Aaron,

Thank you for reaching out regarding order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 and your request for tracking information following the compliance hold release.

We have received your request; however, we were unable to locate order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 in our system at this time. To ensure we can assist you promptly, could you please confirm the order number or share any additional reference details (such as a quote number or PO number) associated with this shipment?

Once we are able to verify the order, our team will review the compliance hold status and provide the tracking information you have requested. Your inquiry has been escalated to a Keysight representative for manual review and follow-up.

We appreciate your patience and apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team"}

parsed.subject: Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold
parsed.body:
Dear Aaron,

Thank you for reaching out regarding order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 and your request for tracking information following the compliance hold release.

We have received your request; however, we were unable to locate order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 in our system at this time. To ensure we can assist you promptly, could you please confirm the order number or share any additional reference details (such as a quote number or PO number) associated with this shipment?

Once we are able to verify the order, our team will review the compliance hold status and provide the tracking information you have requested. Your inquiry has been escalated to a Keysight representative for manual review and follow-up.

We appreciate your patience and apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team
